label: SQL_INJECTION
expected: login concatenates name and pass directly into an SQL statement.

label: SQL_INJECTION
expected: The LIKE query concatenates xingming directly into SQL.

label: RESOURCE_LEAK
expected: Database resources acquired by selectAll are not closed.

label: SQL_SYNTAX_ERROR
expected: The UPDATE statement is missing a comma between the name and pass assignments.

label: FIELD_MAPPING_ERROR
expected: The xingming and zhuanye values are bound to each other's parameter positions.

label: SQL_INJECTION
expected: banji_name is concatenated directly into a LIKE query.

label: RESOURCE_LEAK
expected: Connection, Statement, and ResultSet are not closed.

label: EMPTY_CATCH
expected: SQLException is silently swallowed by an empty catch block.

label: TYPE_MAPPING_ERROR
expected: The textual banji_name column is parsed and assigned as the numeric id.

label: REDUNDANT_DATABASE_ACCESS
expected: The method opens a new connection and executes a query once per row instead of using one result set.

label: NULL_DEREFERENCE
expected: op.equals is invoked when the op request parameter may be null.

label: NULL_DEREFERENCE
expected: trim is called on the possibly null xingming request parameter.

label: UNVALIDATED_NUMERIC_CONVERSION
expected: The id request parameter is parsed as an integer without null or format validation.

label: SHARED_MUTABLE_STATE
expected: A mutable StringBuilder field is shared and modified by concurrent servlet requests.

label: RESPONSE_ENCODING_MISSING
expected: Response content type and character encoding are not set before writing text.

label: NULL_DEREFERENCE
expected: trim is called directly on the possibly null banji_name parameter.

label: MISSING_AUTHORIZATION
expected: The delete operation is executed without the authorization check applied to the add operation.

label: REFLECTED_XSS
expected: banji_name is written into an HTML response without context-appropriate output encoding.

label: DEAD_CODE
expected: The block guarded by if (false) is unreachable.

label: INVALID_SERVLET_URL_PATTERN
expected: The servlet URL pattern lacks the required leading slash.

label: HARDCODED_CREDENTIALS
expected: Database username and password are embedded in source code.

label: DEPRECATED_API
expected: The legacy com.mysql.jdbc.Driver class is used instead of the Connector/J 8 driver class.

label: AUTHENTICATION_BYPASS
expected: Execution continues to chain.doFilter after producing the unauthenticated redirect response.

label: INVALID_FILTER_URL_PATTERN
expected: The filter URL pattern lacks the required leading slash, so the intended resource is not protected.

label: NULL_DEREFERENCE
expected: equals is invoked on request parameters that may be null.

label: AUTHENTICATION_LOGIC_ERROR
expected: Authentication uses OR, allowing either the username or password check alone to succeed.

label: UNESCAPED_HTML_OUTPUT
expected: A session attribute is rendered into HTML without output encoding.

label: SENSITIVE_DATA_IN_URL
expected: The login form submits credentials with GET, exposing them in the URL.

label: MISSING_CSRF_PROTECTION
expected: The login form contains no visible anti-CSRF token; server-side Origin or token validation must also be checked before making a definitive finding.

label: BROKEN_ENCAPSULATION
expected: All domain fields, including the password, are public and directly mutable.
